items.title: Driver fleeing ICE officers crashes, killing a Georgia teacher, authorities say
items.description: Authorities in Georgia say a Guatemalan driver fleeing a Georgia traffic stop by federal immigration officers crashed into another vehicle, killing a ...

items.title: Church explosion in upstate New York injures 5 people, including a firefighter
items.description: A powerful explosion ripped through an upstate New York church and injured five people

items.title: Man cleared after 43 years in prison for murder denied bail during deportation fight
items.description: A Pennsylvania man who spent 43 years in prison before his murder conviction was overturned has been denied bail while he fights deportation

items.title: Belgium summons U.S. ambassador over tweet accusing kingdom of antisemitism
items.description: Belgium has summoned the U.S. ambassador after he accused the country of antisemitic prosecution over a Jewish circumcision case

items.title: New Orleans celebrates Mardi Gras, the indulgent conclusion of Carnival season
items.description: People are celebrating Mardi Gras in New Orleans on Tuesday with parades, revelry and costumes
